quickActions.label: Draft
quickActions.prompt: Draft a new section that would naturally come next in this post.

quickActions.label: Tighten
quickActions.prompt: Tighten the whole post — cut filler, keep the meaning. Update the post.

quickActions.label: Diagram
quickActions.prompt: Add a Mermaid diagram that illustrates the key idea, in a ```mermaid code block. Update the post.

quickActions.label: Title
quickActions.prompt: Suggest 3 sharper alternative titles for this post.

quickActions.label: Callout
quickActions.prompt: Add one useful callout highlighting a common pitfall. Update the post.
